description: Prevent schema, content-exhaustion, typed-reference, binder-cycle, and canvas-runaway failures before constrained decoder finalization

decision.reject: lattice timeout, required-symbol-only no-effect arm, invalid typed references, cyclic binders, recursive container runaway, checkpoint promotion, and ship claims
decision.reason: The final full held-out replay has complete request-marker fidelity with zero fallback or timeout, while weak component roles remain visible
decision.next: improve learned marker-to-component role assignment on the same immutable held-out suite without weakening schema closure

producer_repairs.openui_pack: templatize ProgramSpec output before record emission and assert symbol-only output
producer_repairs.train_settings_seed: replace notify and volume free-form names with declared markers
